title: Cell's Book Club
description: Unique Enchanted Books with minimal and legible designs
body:
# Cell's Book Club
This pack gives each Enchanted Book its own unique, easily recognizable texture. Each book also features a bookmark that droops lower as the enchant level increases. CBC's focus is to provide clean, readable Enchanted Book designs instead of any over-the-top effects that would make the textures overwhelming.

The pack is fully compatible with vanilla 1.21.5+. No external mods are required.

Can you guess each book by using only its texture?

![Enchanted Book Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16b8da89047ae1254eeff9db1ec44d821a17d4b9.png)


<details>
<summary>Enchanted Book Index: Check out each book labeled here!</summary>

![Enchanted Book Index](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8baaaf71223b8f6fa55b3eb3064525a55e1ec704.png)

</details>



## Notes
Some ideas for sprite designs were influenced by [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/blog/onboarding) and [Enchanted Books: Re-Covered](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanted-books-re-covered). Go check them out!

Also check out my other packs [Refreshed Pottery Sherds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refreshed-pottery-sherds) and [Lily Padding](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lily-padding)!
